title: Even More Crafting
description: adds over 11 new crafting recipes to the game  that are usually uncraftable ingame, with more on the way
body:
note: all recipes in this datapack will be unlocked so just search the item name ingame to see the crafting recipe.
### **Recipes Added So Far:**  
1. **Blaze Rod**  
2. **Breeze Rod**  
3. **Crying Obsidian**  
4. **Dragon Breath**  
5. **Dragon Egg**  
6. **Dragon Head**  
7. **Elytra**  
8. **Ghast Tear**  
9. **Notch Apple**  
10. **Saddle**  
11. **Trident**
